basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Hospital Dwarka (IGH Dwarka) has released 3 Senior Resident vacancies. Eligible candidates with MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae. or MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis can attend the walk-in interview on 02-06-2026 at health.delhi.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae., MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis

seo_tags: IGH Dwarka Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
